name: Matt Hefner
bio: Matt Hefner serves as the Camp County Sheriff, overseeing law enforcement for Camp County from the county seat of Pittsburg. Sheriff Hefner is dedicated to maintaining safety in this close-knit East Texas community through vigilant patrol and responsive service.
campaignPromises: Maintain strong law enforcement presence throughout Camp County
Keep the county jail operating efficiently and safely
Support school safety initiatives in local districts
Strengthen cooperation with Pittsburg Police Department
Protect rural property owners from theft and trespassing
